svg.title: TCP three-way handshake
svg.desc: Sequence diagram showing SYN, SYN-ACK, and ACK messages between client and server establishing a TCP connection

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a SYN packet and what does seq=x mean in TCP?')
sendPrompt('What state is the server in before the handshake?')
sendPrompt('What does SYN do in the TCP handshake? What is seq=x?')
sendPrompt('What state does the client enter after sending SYN?')
sendPrompt('What state does the server enter after receiving SYN?')
sendPrompt('What does SYN-ACK mean? Why does the server also send a SYN?')
sendPrompt('What state is the client in after receiving SYN-ACK?')
sendPrompt('Why is the third ACK needed? What happens after it is sent?')
sendPrompt('When does the server reach ESTABLISHED state?')

svg.text: Click any step to drill deeper
